description_long: This is a rectangular, red-brick apartment building with two main stories and a flat, light-colored roof featuring various rooftop structures. The building is flanked by two parallel roads and has a green lawn area in front, with a row of flowering trees and a parking lot filled with cars. The facade is characterized by evenly spaced white-framed windows and a central entrance with steps leading up to it. The rear side includes a small garage and additional access points. The overall design is symmetrical, with a classic, urban residential appearance and landscaping that enhances curb appeal.
description: A red-brick, two-story apartment building with a flat roof, white-framed windows, and a landscaped front with parking and flowering trees.
description_view_0: The long side of the building is visible, showing the main facade with evenly spaced windows, central entrance, and adjacent roads.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the parking lot, row of flowering trees, and the main entrance centered on the building.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is shown, featuring a continuous row of windows and green lawn, with less landscaping detail.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a small garage, secondary entrance, and utility areas, with the road running behind the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in evenly spaced rows and columns along the building's facades, creating a balanced and orderly appearance.
